name: HMS MA/SB 6 (MA/SB 6)
events: 3 Dec 1940 HMS H 50 (Lt. M. Willmott, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Holyhead with MA/SB 6. Upon completion of these exercises HMS H 50 conducted independent exercises before returning to Holyhead. (1)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
